creator: lbartoletti@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 189850
postgis23 2.3.5 -> 2.3.6 and postgis24 2.4.2 -> 2.4.3

The PostGIS development team is pleased to provide bug fix release 2.3.6 and 2.4.3 for the 2.3 and 2.4 stable branches.

Key fixes in these releases are Brin upgrade, ST_Transform schema qualification to fix issues with restore, foreign table, and materialized view use, ClusterKMeans and encoded polyline fixes.

View all closed tickets for 2.4.3 and 2.3.6. https://trac.osgeo.org/postgis/query?status=closed&resolution=fixed&milestone=PostGIS+2.4.3&milestone=PostGIS+2.3.6&col=id&col=summary&col=milestone&col=status&col=type&col=priority&col=component&order=priority

---
Poudriere 10, 11 i386/amd64 OK
